name: Vegetable Rice Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except oil in a large bowl.
2. Form the mixture into 12 thin patties, pressing firmly with hands.
3. In a large skillet, heat vegetable oil over medium heat.
4. Cook the patties in batches until brown, turning once.
5. Serve with dairy sour cream or yogurt, if desired.
Each serving provides:
243 calories
5.7 g. protein
11.6 g. fat
29.6 g. carbohydrate
390 mg. sodium
91 mg. cholesterol
NOTE: Optional ingredients are omitted from the nutritional calculations. When ingredient options appear in a recipe, the first ingredient choice is used for calculation.
